necessityProof.blockerResolved: After v2127 migrated the evidence report family, the adjacent consumer-readiness, current-evidence, batch-closeout, preflight, and availability-closeout renderers still copied the same markdown title/meta/section skeleton.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: N5 Phase-B review can now scan the remaining Java / mini-kv route catalog cleanup report surface without reading six more duplicated renderer bodies.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: The shared report builder owns the markdown skeleton. The evidence-file helper is reused only for id/exists/resolvedPath/digest references. Batch closeout path/size/sha references, live-smoke process plans, read targets, and historical fixture roots remain local because their line shapes carry report-specific operational meaning.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: This batch adds no new helper. Future renderer migration must reuse the builder only when byte-identical comparison proves the output unchanged; new helpers require repeated same-shape evidence plus a written stop condition.

focusedRendererBatch.command: npx vitest run test/verificationReportBuilder.test.ts test/governanceGrowthRatchet.test.ts and 6 route catalog cleanup renderer tests --testTimeout=180000

byteIdenticalCompare.method: Temporary Vitest test loaded legacy renderer source from git HEAD, rewired imports to current source modules, loaded real reports, and asserted equality with each migrated renderer output.

lint.note: Warnings are the existing v2115 baseline and are outside this renderer-consolidation batch.

archiveDeliverables: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2099-renderer-consolidation-batch-11-v2128.md

crossProjectParallel.reason: v2128 only changes Node markdown rendering for existing route catalog cleanup reports; it does not request fresh sibling evidence, live integration, upstream service startup, or schema changes.
